news.t: JP Morgan Adds Futures ETF to Lineup
Beyond JEPI: Exploring JP Morgan's Active ETF Bench
J.P. Morgan Asset Management Launches Hedged Equity Laddered Overlay ETF: HELO

holdings.infoBox: HELO is an equity ETF with a total of 163 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 8.60%, Apple at 6.98%, Microsoft at 5.09%, Amazon.com at 4.32%, and Alphabet at 3.56%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Hedged Equity Laddered Overlay ETF (HELO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively manages a large-cap US equity portfolio with a laddered options overlay that seeks to provide downside protection, while foregoing some upside potential. The fund aims for enhanced risk-adjusted return over a full market cycle with lower volatility than traditional equity strategies HELO was launched on Sep 28, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
